response.justification: Mohammed has over 10 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, Git) and demonstrates deep expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS CDK), testing (Vitest/Jest equivalents), and scalable architecture — plus notable open-source contributions and process advocacy. His only minor gaps are limited explicit mention of Nest.js and Kotlin/Java in recent roles, but his adaptability and breadth compensate.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK
Proven expertise in AI-agent systems and developer tooling, including MCP frameworks
Strong advocacy for testing, CI/CD, and engineering best practices with open-source contributions
concerns: Nest.js is not explicitly mentioned in recent roles, though Node.js and TypeScript experience is strong
Kotlin/Java experience is dated (last seen in 2018), with no recent enterprise use cited
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based teams
